title: Make DSR a HARD GATE in M3 promotion (currently tier-sizing + diagnostic only)
source: CEO-relayed external survival-sweep analysis (65/131441 video) 2026-05-29; confirmed against code by hackathon-pm.
why: DSR (deflated_sharpe_ratio) is computed and stored (psr_dsr.json, dsr_per_model) and used for deployment-tier Kelly sizing in pipeline/deployment.py, but phase5/run_proposal.py::evaluate_against_falsification gates ONLY on audit_class_in + median_active_fold_sharpe_min + n_trades -- it does NOT gate on DSR. So a candidate can be classed STABLE/MARGINAL on raw fold Sharpe while its trial-deflated DSR is ~0. The external video heuristic OOS-cannot-beat-IS-by->30% is a poor-man proxy for exactly this; DSR subsumes it -- but only if DSR is load-bearing in the PROMOTE decision, which it currently is not.
value_rationale: Medium: closes a real overfit hole in the promotion gate; cheap; aligns the gate with the deflation we already compute.
scope: Add dsr_min to FalsificationCriterion (default e.g. 0.90 or 0.95) and gate the falsification_verdict on per-model/aggregated DSR in evaluate_against_falsification.
TDD: a candidate with high raw fold Sharpe but DSR<dsr_min is falsified (NOT promoted).
Document that DSR subsumes the OOS-vs-IS-30% heuristic.

history.reason: Implemented DSR hard gate: dsr_min on FalsificationCriterion (default None, recommended 0.90), threaded per-model DSR into evaluate_against_falsification, downgrades to NOT_PROFITABLE + falsified when DSR<dsr_min/NaN/None. 12 TDD tests green. Subsumes OOS-vs-IS-30pct heuristic.
feat(methodology+spike): DSR hard promotion gate (B0089 done) + CMF mean-rev null (B0088 discarded)
feat(phase5): CMF survivors die in full M3 audit (9th null); DSR gate works; fix B0087
